Surname.jp: おっとりゆるふわ獣人姫

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52127_0]</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52127_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52127_0]</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52127_0]ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52127_0]</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52127_0]턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52127_0]</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52127_0]回合</color>。

description.en: With a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52128_0]</color> chance, decreases all enemies' <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52128_0]</color> turns.
description.jp: 敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>と<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52128_0]</color>の確率で、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52128_0]</color>ターンの間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52128_0]</color> 확률로 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>와 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52128_0]턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 以<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52128_0]</color>的概率在<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52128_0]</color>回合内降低全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>与<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52129_0]</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Silenced</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52129_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52129_0]</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>沈黙</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52129_0]ターン</color>の間付与する
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52129_0]</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52129_0]턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>침묵</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52129_0]</color>的几率使其陷入<color=#28d9ed>沉默</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52129_0]回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> proportional to missing Health. <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> can increase up to <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n残りHPが低いほど<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>がUPする。<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>は最大<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n生命值越低,<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>越高。<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>最多提升<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>。

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, restores your HP by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 시작 시 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>회복합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,回复自身生命值<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
